metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced culinary techniques, nutrition knowledge, and food safety practices while exploring the professional restaurant industry. This course combines practical cooking skills with understanding food preparation principles, menu development, and kitchen management.
metadata.general_description: An applied course in advanced cooking techniques, nutrition, food safety, and professional culinary operations.

big_ideas.statement: Culinary arts combine scientific understanding with creative expression to transform raw ingredients into nourishing and memorable meals.
big_ideas.elaboration: Knowledge of food chemistry, cooking methods, and flavour principles enables both technical proficiency and culinary creativity.

big_ideas.statement: Nutrition and food safety are foundational responsibilities that ensure meals support health and prevent illness.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding nutritional needs, allergen management, and food handling practices is essential for professional culinary work.

big_ideas.statement: Professional kitchens require coordinated teamwork, efficient systems, and strong leadership to produce quality meals consistently.
big_ideas.elaboration: Kitchen brigades, communication protocols, and operational systems enable efficient production of high-quality food in service environments.

big_ideas.statement: Cultural food traditions reflect identity and community values while providing opportunities for creative interpretation and innovation.
big_ideas.elaboration: Respect for food traditions, including First Peoples foodways, enriches culinary practice and connects food to cultural meaning.

competencies.raw: Design menus that balance nutrition, flavour, and cost considerations
i_can_statements: I can develop menus aligned with nutritional guidelines and health requirements
I can design menus featuring diverse culinary traditions and dietary preferences
I can create seasonal menus utilizing available local ingredients
I can balance menu offerings to optimize food cost and profitability

competencies.raw: Plan food preparation systems and kitchen workflows for efficiency and quality
i_can_statements: I can design prep lists and production schedules for service
I can organize kitchen stations and workflow for efficiency
I can establish mise en place systems and ingredient portioning
I can plan food service operations from prep to plating

competencies.raw: Develop recipes and cooking techniques that achieve desired outcomes
i_can_statements: I can modify standard recipes to meet dietary and nutritional needs
I can select appropriate cooking methods for different ingredients
I can design cooking processes to achieve flavour and texture goals
I can scale recipes for different portion sizes and service levels

competencies.raw: Evaluate food quality and menu offerings for improvement and innovation
i_can_statements: I can assess food quality and sensory characteristics
I can collect customer feedback and incorporate into menu development
I can analyze culinary trends and innovation opportunities
I can evaluate cost and profitability of menu items

competencies.raw: Execute advanced cooking techniques with precision and consistency
i_can_statements: I can execute knife skills safely and efficiently
I can apply advanced cooking methods: saucing, braising, sous-vide, etc.
I can prepare stocks, sauces, and foundational preparations
I can plate and present dishes professionally with attention to aesthetics

competencies.raw: Apply food safety and sanitation practices in all food handling
i_can_statements: I can maintain food safety standards and prevent cross-contamination
I can identify and manage common allergens in food preparation
I can apply proper food storage, labeling, and rotation procedures
I can maintain clean and sanitary kitchen environments

competencies.raw: Manage nutrition and dietary considerations in meal preparation
i_can_statements: I can apply nutrition principles to recipe and menu development
I can accommodate dietary restrictions and preferences in cooking
I can calculate nutritional information and portion sizes
I can create balanced meals supporting health and wellness

competencies.raw: Coordinate kitchen operations and work effectively in a culinary team
i_can_statements: I can organize and manage kitchen stations
I can communicate effectively with kitchen team members
I can respond to service demands with efficiency and quality
I can mentor and support other kitchen staff

competencies.raw: Use culinary equipment and tools safely and effectively
i_can_statements: I can operate standard kitchen equipment safely and correctly
I can maintain and care for culinary tools and equipment
I can understand advanced cooking technologies and equipment
I can troubleshoot and adapt when equipment is unavailable

competencies.raw: Apply food science understanding to cooking methods and ingredient interactions
i_can_statements: I can explain how cooking methods affect food composition and flavour
I can understand chemical and physical changes in food during cooking
I can apply food science to troubleshoot cooking problems
I can use precise temperatures and timing for optimal results

competencies.raw: Use digital tools for recipe management, nutrition analysis, and planning
i_can_statements: I can use recipe management and costing software
I can access and manage digital recipes and culinary resources
I can use nutrition analysis tools to evaluate menu items
I can plan menus and schedules using digital tools

competencies.raw: Evaluate emerging culinary technologies and food preparation innovations
i_can_statements: I can assess new cooking technologies for kitchen use
I can understand molecular gastronomy and modern cooking techniques
I can evaluate food delivery and service technologies
I can identify opportunities for culinary innovation and improvement

areas.name: Advanced Cooking Techniques
topics: Knife skills: julienne, brunoise, chiffonade, and specialized cuts
Dry and moist heat cooking methods: sauteing, braising, poaching, steaming
Sauce preparation: mother sauces, demi-glace, vinaigrettes, emulsions
Stock and soup preparation techniques
Advanced plating, garnishing, and food presentation
Specialized cooking techniques: sous-vide, foams, spheres, etc.

areas.name: Nutrition and Health in Culinary Practice
areas.raw: Nutrition and Health in Culinary Practice
topics: Macronutrients and micronutrients in food composition
Dietary guidelines and balanced meal planning
Cooking methods that preserve nutritional value
Accommodating dietary restrictions: allergies, intolerances, preferences
Nutrient analysis and portion control
Cultural and traditional food practices that support health

areas.name: Food Safety and Professional Standards
topics: Foodborne illness prevention and contamination control
Proper food storage, handling, and temperature management
Allergen identification and cross-contamination prevention
Kitchen sanitation and cleaning protocols
Food labeling, dating, and inventory management
Health regulations and professional food service standards

areas.name: Restaurant Industry and Kitchen Management
topics: Kitchen brigade system and roles within professional kitchens
Menu development and cost control
Ordering, receiving, and inventory management
Kitchen workflow, station organization, and timing
Leadership and communication in kitchen environments
Sustainability and waste reduction in culinary operations
